title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (d), PAGE ONE HUNDRED TWENTY-FIVE, SECTION TWO-43 (QUEZON) OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5297 / 53 OG No. 16, 5144 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1709, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (d), PAGE ONE HUNDRED TWENTY-FIVE, SECTION TWO-43 (QUEZON) OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (

d

), page one hundred twenty-five, section two-43 (Quezon) of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven is hereby amended to read as follows:

2,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
